message:
Running command: # Check if librelane has a specific version pin it expects for sky130A
# The issue: librelane 3.0.2 may have a hardcoded expected PDK version
python3 -c "
import librelane
print(librelane.__file__)
" 2>/dev/null || true

# Find librelane PDK version config
find /home/user/.nix-profile -name "*.toml" -path "*librelane*" 2>/dev/null | head -5
find /nix -name "*.py" -path "*librelane*pdk*" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | xargs grep -l "8afc8346\|version" 2>/dev/null | head -3

print(librelane.__file__)
